Entries.TranslationAccurate: [Jii]: Taru, today is Takoyaki Day again... [Taru]: Yay!! [Honmaru]: H-Hey, [Taru]!

Entries.TextOriginal: ほんまる「やったぜー！ ほんものの ピレゼントを[NL]はっけんしたぜー！[NL]タル「ほんまる はやく いよなんちに いこー！！[33][3F]
Entries.TextTranslation: [Honmaru]: Found the present![3C][3D][Taru]: Let's hurry![33][3F]
Entries.TranslationAccurate: [Honmaru]: We did it! We found the real present! [Taru]: [Honmaru], let's hurry over to [Iyona]'s place!!

Entries.TextOriginal: タル「わーい！ たこやきが いっぱいあるぞ！！[NL]ほんまる「タルー！ はやく いこーぜ！[33][3F]
Entries.TextTranslation: [Taru]: Lots of Tako![NL][Honmaru]: Let's go![33][3F]
Entries.TranslationAccurate: [Taru]: Yay! There's a ton of takoyaki here!! [Honmaru]: [Taru]! Let's hurry and get going!

Entries.TextOriginal: ほんまる「いよなちゃん たんじょうびおめでとう！[NL]タル「いよなー おめでとー！！[NL]いよな「ありがとう ほんまるくん タルちゃん！[3C][3D]いよな「さあどうぞ゜ボーティーを はじめましょ！[33][3F]
Entries.TextTranslation: [Honmaru]: HBD Iyona![NL][Taru]: HBD![3C][3D][Iyona]: Thanks guys![3C][3D]Come in! Let's party![33][3F]
Entries.TranslationAccurate: [Honmaru]: Happy birthday, [Iyona]! [Taru]: [Iyona], happy birthday!! [Iyona]: Thank you, [Honmaru], [Taru]! Come on in, let's start the party!

Entries.TextOriginal: ほんまる「だめだー！ まだ ピレゼントを ようい[NL]してないぜー！！[NL]タル「ほんまる はやく さがそう！[33][3F]
Entries.TextTranslation: [Honmaru]: No present yet![3C][3D][Taru]: Let's look![33][3F]
Entries.TranslationAccurate: [Honmaru]: This is bad! We haven't prepared the present yet!! [Taru]: [Honmaru], let's hurry and look for one!

Entries.TextOriginal: タル「いよな つかまえたぞー！[NL]いよな「きゃっ タルちゃん くすぐったいわ！[NL]ほんまる「タ タルー！ ずるいぜー！！[33][3F]

Entries.TranslationAccurate: [Taru]: I caught [Iyona]! [Iyona]: Eek! [Taru], that tickles! [Honmaru]: H-Hey [Taru]! That's not fair!!

Entries.TranslationAccurate: [Miss Ooaya]: [Honmaru], [Taru], you've reached the goal! Oh? [Honmaru], what's the matter? [Honmaru]: I... I finally... m-made it here......

Entries.TranslationAccurate: [Honmaru]: [Iyona]! Are you alright?! [Iyona]: [Honmaru]! You came to rescue me! [Taru]: Yeah! We came to save [Iyona]!

Entries.TextTranslation: [Taru]: Matt, how's biz?[3C][3D][Honmaru]: I want Tako![3C][3D]Matt: Free service![3C][3D][NL][Taru]: Yay![33][3F]
Entries.TranslationAccurate: [Taru]: Hey Mattsaan, business going well? [Honmaru]: I want to eat Mattsaan's takoyaki! Matsugoro: Welcome, little one. Matsugoro: Fine, fine! Take as much as you want! This is a super special service just for you!! [Taru]: Yay!!
